headline: Bunge Recognized as One of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies®
summary: ST. LOUIS, March 18, 2026--Bunge (NYSE:BG) has been named as one of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere.

headline: Bunge Global Debt Raise Supports Refinancing Cash Flexibility And Valuation Case
summary: Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) completed a $1.2b senior notes offering to support refinancing and investments. The company plans to use the proceeds for debt refinancing, working capital, capital expenditures, stock buybacks, and other corporate purposes. This financing move follows a period of strong share performance and active capital allocation discussions around NYSE:BG. Bunge Global enters this financing step with its shares at $125.96 and a value score of 4, alongside a 73.8% return over the...
